/home/wen/.local/share/mamba/envs/ros_env/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,dpgo_pybind.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o dpgo_pybind.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/dpgo_pybind.dir/dpgo_pybind.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wen/Desktop/Project-Slam/C1-DAUG/DUAG-SLAM/extracted/dpgo_wrapper/../../repos/dpgo/build/lib:/home/wen/Desktop/Project-Slam/C1-DAUG/DUAG-SLAM/repos/dpgo/build/lib /home/wen/Desktop/Project-Slam/C1-DAUG/DUAG-SLAM/repos/dpgo/build/lib/libDPGO.so /home/wen/Desktop/Project-Slam/C1-DAUG/DUAG-SLAM/repos/dpgo/build/lib/libroptlib.so /home/wen/.local/share/mamba/envs/ros_env/lib/libblas.so -lcholmod -lspqr
